user_query: What gives Calvin a sense of achievement and purpose?
full_query: READ(/Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[atom(content =~ "Calvin")]/Session[atom(content =~ "achievement purpose")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "sense of achievement") or atom(content =~ "sense of purpose")])
xpath_query: /Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[atom(content =~ "Calvin")]/Session[atom(content =~ "achievement purpose")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "sense of achievement") or atom(content =~ "sense of purpose")]
canonical_full_query: READ(/Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[content =~ "Calvin"]/Session[content =~ "achievement purpose"]/max(Observation[content =~ "sense of achievement"], Observation[content =~ "sense of purpose"]))
canonical_xpath_query: /Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[content =~ "Calvin"]/Session[content =~ "achievement purpose"]/max(Observation[content =~ "sense of achievement"], Observation[content =~ "sense of purpose"])

selected_nodes.text: Calvin feels a sense of achievement and relaxation similar to meditating when fixing cars.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Describes how fixing cars gives Calvin a sense of achievement and relaxation.

selected_nodes.text: Calvin is hustling as a musician and finds the necklace a reminder of why he keeps pushing forward.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Mentions Calvin's hustle as a musician and how a necklace serves as a reminder of his purpose.

selected_nodes.text: Calvin is passionate about music and performing, finding it like his purpose and passion.
selected_nodes.reasoning: States that Calvin finds passion and purpose in music and performing.

selected_nodes.text: Calvin values making a difference and sharing his own story through music.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Highlights Calvin's desire to make a difference and share his story through music.

selected_nodes.text: Performing live always fuels Calvin's soul and gives him a rush and a powerful connection with the crowd.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Explains how performing live fuels Calvin's soul and connects him with the crowd.

selected_nodes.text: Calvin is excited about going on a tour and growing his brand.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Indicates Calvin's excitement about touring and growing his brand, contributing to his sense of purpose.

selected_nodes.text: Calvin appreciates positive feedback and views it as a motivation to reach more people with his music.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Shows that positive feedback motivates Calvin to reach more people with his music.
